reference: Hi, my ten-month-old is just getting over pneumonia and was admitted to the hospital two weeks ago. She had an ear infection and was on medication for five days. Now, today she has a yellow-greenish vaginal discharge. What should I do? She has never had a diaper rash, but she did have a bladder infection from medication before, and she has never experienced discharge.
text: Hi, my ten-month-old is just getting over pneumonia and was admitted to the hospital two weeks ago. She had an ear infection and was on medication for five days. Now today she has a yellow-greenish vaginal discharge. What should I do? She has never had a diaper rash, but she did have a bladder infection from medication before, and she has never experienced discharge.
